description_long: This is a pair of traditional open-toe sandals featuring a tan footbed with visible stitching around the perimeter and a slightly contoured heel and toe area. The upper consists of a dark brown, almost black, leather-like strap with white stitching and a central gold-accented buckle detail, forming a thong-style toe separator. The sole appears to be made of a durable black rubber or synthetic material, providing grip and support. The footbed has a smooth, slightly glossy finish, while the straps have a more matte appearance with visible seams. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for casual urban wear. The sandals show no visible signs of wear, maintaining a clean and well-constructed appearance.
description: A pair of dark brown thong sandals with tan stitched footbeds and black rubber soles, featuring gold-accented buckles and a clean, unworn look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open toe area, contoured footbeds, and the central thong straps with gold-accented buckles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the black sole, the arch of the footbed, and the profile of the dark brown straps.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full shape of the footbeds, the stitching detail, and the placement of the thong straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the sandals and the construction of the straps.
